divergences.note: Two independent 'memory' schemas coexist: the earlier agent-memory graph (axon_memory_nodes/edges, crates/axon-jobs/src/migrations/0009_create_memory_tables.sql) and the current axon-memory durable store (memory_records/memory_links/memory_reinforcement/memory_reviews, crates/axon-memory/src/migrations/0001_create_memory_tables.sql). Not renamed here; documented for the future contract decision.

axon_watch_defs/axon_watch_runs (migration 0002) back the task_type/task_payload watch scheduler; axon_source_watches/axon_source_watch_runs (migration 0023) back the newer SourceRequest-shaped WatchStore used by `watch get|update|pause|resume|delete`. Both are live; not merged here.

columns: CASE priority WHEN 'interactive' THEN 0 WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'normal' THEN 2 WHEN 'background' THEN 3 WHEN 'maintenance' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
indexes.name: idx_axon_jobs_claim
idx_axon_jobs_deadline
indexes.where: deadline_at IS NOT NULL AND status = 'running'
